mapper.select: SELECT * FROM categories WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM categories WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC
SELECT * FROM categories WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO categories (name, code, parent_id, sort, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) VALUES (#{name}, #{code}, #{parentId}, #{sort}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE categories SET name = #{name}, code = #{code}, parent_id = #{parentId}, sort = #{sort}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE categories SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
